## Summary
Describe what changed and why.

## Scope
- [ ] Python
- [ ] R/Posit
- [ ] Rust
- [ ] Terraform
- [ ] CI/CD
- [ ] Documentation/Governance

## Validation
- [ ] Structure checklist still valid
- [ ] No forbidden tracked paths (`results/`, `logs/`, `tests/scripts/`)
- [ ] Relevant tests executed
- [ ] Terraform checks executed (if IaC changed)

## Security and Data Considerations
- [ ] No secrets committed
- [ ] Data protection/privacy impact assessed
- [ ] Prompt/inference behavior updated (if applicable)

## Risks and Rollback
Describe known risks and rollback approach.
